headline: Appaloosa Management Sold Entire Stake In American Airlines Group; ASML Holding; Delta Air Lines; Deutsche Bank; Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company; IQVIA Holdings; Mohawk Industries; Owens Corning; Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company; United Airlines Holdings.
